backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point for the ICP canister.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (design system, navbar, hero, about, etc.) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining CSS custom property color tokens for light and dark themes including sidebar, chart, and UI element variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the NexNam React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes the full page layout by rendering Navbar, HeroSection eagerly and all other sections (About, Services, Portfolio, Team, etc.) via lazy-loaded Suspense boundaries.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section component featuring animated stat counters, a company timeline, and mission/vision/values cards with scroll-triggered entrance animations.
frontend/src/components/CTASection.tsx: Contact/CTA section with a react-hook-form contact form, a benefits list, and animated entrance effects; shows a success state after form submission.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with the NexNam brand logo, navigation anchor links, social media icon links, and a gradient top border.
frontend/src/components/Hero3DBackground: Renders an animated Three.js 3D background using React Three Fiber, featuring two rotating wireframe icosahedra and two particle systems (spherical and scattered) with purple/cyan color scheme.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a dark background, 3D canvas overlay, fade-in animated badge/headline/subheadline, and CTA buttons that smooth-scroll to contact and work sections.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with scroll-aware glassmorphism styling, smooth-scroll anchor links, a gradient logo, and a responsive mobile menu toggle.
frontend/src/components/PortfolioSection: Displays four portfolio project cards (FinTech, AI SaaS, E-commerce, HealthTech) with device mockups, problem/solution/result details, and scroll-triggered fade-in animations.
frontend/src/components/ProcessSection.t: Five-step process section (Discover → Scale) with scroll-driven animated connecting line and staggered fade-in cards, each showing an icon, number, title, and description.
Services grid showcasing five offerings (web apps, SaaS, UI/UX, AI, performance) using interactive 3D-tilt cards with mouse-tracking glow effects and scroll-triggered entrance animations.
frontend/src/components/TeamSection.tsx: Renders an animated 'Meet the Founders' section with two team member cards (Alex Morgan and Sarah Chen), each showing avatar, bio, and LinkedIn link, plus a shared quote block at the bottom.
frontend/src/components/TechnologySectio: Displays a 'Tech Stack' section with a floating, animated grid of 15 technology badges (React, Next.js, AWS, etc.), each styled with its brand color.
frontend/src/components/TestimonialsSect: Renders a looping Embla carousel of five client testimonials with star ratings, auto-scroll every 4 seconds, and prev/next navigation controls.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCountUp.ts: Custom hook that animates a number from 0 to a target value with an ease-out cubic curve once the referenced element enters the viewport.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login, logout, and identity state with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useInView.ts: Custom hook wrapping IntersectionObserver that returns a ref and a boolean indicating whether the element is currently visible in the viewport.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module that exports nothing, noting that no backend queries are needed for this purely frontend SPA.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, defines NexNam brand CSS variables and OKLCH shadcn tokens, and provides Tailwind utility classes for glass effects, gradient text, glow shadows, and button styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider (React Query) and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, NexNam brand colors, custom fonts (Inter, Space Grotesk), glow box shadows, gradient background utilities, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing the NexNam portfolio SPA's architecture, tech stack, design system, 11 sections, existing features, known issues, and image requirements at schema version 1.0.0.
